ItacPersonItem.Notes: The Umoristi tried to expell him from the Academy in 1650, as he was accused of slander against fellow academicians (See Limentani, La satira nel Seicento, 1961, p. 197)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
